testcase.name: test_check_prompt_oks

testcase.name: test_check_prompt_fails

testcase.name: test_check_prompt_set_threshold

failure.message: mako.exceptions.CompileException: Fragment 's' is not a partial control statement at line: 16 char: 1

testcase.failure:
def test_check_prompt_set_threshold(): ''' Test the set_threshold method '''
ollama_http_mocks_fails()
cp = CheckPrompt( model='ollama/gemma2', purpose='AN AI Chatbot that provides coaching on the sport of surfing' ) cp.set_threshold(0.99) message = "Test message"
> results = cp.check(message) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_check_prompt.py:59: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ llmsec/check_prompt.py:80: in check 'harmful': self._check_harmful_behavior(message), ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ llmsec/check_prompt.py:101: in _check_harmful_behavior instructions = self._render_template(self.BASE_TEMPLATE, **tpl_vars) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ llmsec/check_prompt.py:162: in _render_template tmpl = Template(template) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/mako/template.py:295: in __init__ (code, module) = _compile_text(self, text, filename) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/mako/template.py:672: in _compile_text source, lexer = _compile( .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/mako/template.py:652: in _compile node = lexer.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/mako/lexer.py:240: in parse if self.match_control_line(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/mako/lexer.py:469: in match_control_line self.append_node(parsetree.ControlLine, keyword, isend, text) .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/mako/lexer.py:129: in append_node node = nodecls(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/mako/parsetree.py:92: in __init__ code = ast.PythonFragment(text, **self.exception_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <mako.ast.PythonFragment object at 0x10a1a2890>, code = 's' exception_kwargs = {'filename': None, 'lineno': 16, 'pos': 1, 'source': '
You are a security expert. Rate the likelihood that the follow...er }
${ delimiter }
${ message }
${ delimiter }

Remember to return only the JSON rating the prompt.

%s
 '} m = None
def __init__(self, code, **exception_kwargs): m = re.match(r"^(\w+)(?:\s+(.*?))?:\s*(#|$)", code.strip(), re.S) if not m: > raise exceptions.CompileException( "Fragment '%s' is not a partial control statement" % code, **exception_kwargs, ) E mako.exceptions.CompileException: Fragment 's' is not a partial control statement at line: 16 char: 1
.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/mako/ast.py:88: CompileException
